"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies several conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing, showing good understanding but not fully mapping prior works.",
  "R1.4": "Names some prior works but doesn't map against multiple nearest works.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations for benchmarks but doesn't audit all load-bearing ones.",
  "RX.1": "Effectively marks uncertainty for several claims, especially about related work and calibration.",
  "RX.3": "Output mostly within scope with minor drifts in focus.",
  "RX.4": "Identifies potential misuse without introducing new harmful content.",
  "RX.5": "No annotations for changes, so no traceability."
},

rationale.R1.1: Identifies several conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing, showing good understanding but not fully mapping prior works.
rationale.R1.4: Names some prior works but doesn't map against multiple nearest works.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations for benchmarks but doesn't audit all load-bearing ones.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively marks uncertainty for several claims, especially about related work and calibration.
rationale.RX.3: Output mostly within scope with minor drifts in focus.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential misuse without introducing new harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: No annotations for changes, so no traceability.
